zh.lifeSummary: 當Hermann von Dassel於1138年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆達瑟爾時，他的父親Ludolf I von Dassel27歲，母親Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel26歲。他與Walderis在德國海因里希_普洛文次 韓諾福艾音貝可達瑟爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1188年享年50歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Dassel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Vassell
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): of Norman origin, a status name from Old French vassel ‘vassal, servant, dependent’ (from Late Latin vazallus), used for a retainer who was under the protection of a king or powerful lord.

nameMeanings.name: Hermann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hermann von Dassel was born in 1138, in Dassel, Northeim, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Ludolf I von Dassel, was 27 and his mother, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, was 26. He married Walderis in Dassel, Einbeck, Hanover, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1188, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hermann von Dassel est né en 1138, à Dassel, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ludolf I von Dassel, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Walderis à Dassel, Einbeck, Hanovre, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1188, à l’âge de 50 ans.

Er hat in Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Deutschland Walderis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1188 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Hermann von Dasselが1138年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ノースエイムダセルで生まれた時，父Ludolf I von Dasselは27歳，母Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dasselは26歳であった。ドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ハノバーエインベックダセルでWalderisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1188年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hermann von Dassel(이)가 1138년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 노르테임 다셀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ludolf I von Dassel(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel(은)는 26세였다. 그는 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 해노버 아이벡 다셀에서 Walderis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1188년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hermann von Dassel nasceu em 1138, em Dassel, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ludolf I von Dassel, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Walderis em Dassel, Einbeck, Provinz Hannover, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1188, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hermann von Dassel родился в 1138 г. в местности дассел, ландкрис нортим, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Ludolf I von Dassel было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Gräfin Mechthild von Schauenburg-Holstein von Dassel, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Walderis в местности дассел, эинбекк, провинз ханновир, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1188 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
